item.title: Rescuing an owl that was trapped in mud
item.dc:creator: DOcelot1

item.title: I'm an American... Right?
item.description: Elon Musk sent shockwaves through the internet Elon Musk sent shockwaves through the internet last night after tweeting that his life is in danger for “exposing an AI system quietly controlling global infrastructure behind the scenes.” According to Musk, he uncovered a covert network where AI systems, not governments, are making critical decisions in finance, defense, and even elections. At a rally the next day, Donald Trump went off-script, calling Musk “a whistleblower the world needs” and declaring, “We’re not ruled by humans anymore.” He then named the alleged architect of the AI control grid on live television, prompting the crowd to erupt — and causing the livestream to mysteriously freeze for nearly 20 seconds. The New York Times has begun a full-scale investigation into the claims, with reporters tracking the deeper layers of this potential global cover-up. Every American is encouraged to pay close attention — the consequences of unchecked AI governance are staggering. Your engagement now could be critical in defending transparency and democratic control. https://nytimes.com-news-trump-musk-allies-article-100024@drjacobfernandes.blogspot.com/2025/07/nytimes.html Exactly. How are people this stupid to assume this can’t happen to them?! The orange chucklefuck, on numerous occasions, has talked about getting rid of citizens. We already know the courts won’t stand up for regular folks. And even if they did, it’s not like we have a law enforcement agency that would enforce anything. There are only two reasons to vote for Trump and the GOP: you are rich and are protecting your class, or you are stupid. That is it.
item.dc:creator: mcintyPilot

item.title: My spirit animal.
item.description: Google him. It's worth the read Most viral edit: Send me monkeystuff.. or the goodies
item.dc:creator: Ratfinkel

item.title: That's her legacy! No one will remember anything she did except her yes vote!
item.description: Anyone see the interview she had after the bill passed the senate? There has rarely ever been a more slappable face than Murkowski. Elon Musk sent shockwaves through the internet last night after tweeting that his life is in danger for “exposing an AI system quietly controlling global infrastructure behind the scenes.” According to Musk, he uncovered a covert network where AI systems, not governments, are making critical decisions in finance, defense, and even elections. At a rally the next day, Donald Trump went off-script, calling Musk “a whistleblower the world needs” and declaring, “We’re not ruled by humans anymore.” He then named the alleged architect of the AI control grid on live television, prompting the crowd to erupt — and causing the livestream to mysteriously freeze for nearly 20 seconds. The New York Times has begun a full-scale investigation into the claims, with reporters tracking the deeper layers of this potential global cover-up. Every American is encouraged to pay close attention — the consequences of unchecked AI governance are staggering. Your engagement now could be critical in defending transparency and democratic control. https://nytimes.com-news-trump-musk-allies-article-100024@drjacobfernandes.blogspot.com/2025/07/nytimes.html
item.dc:creator: mcintyPilot

item.title: Animal sounds
item.description: 2: what i hear when my daughter is mad at me. 5: stuff of nightmares 9: Aka a war zone. Christ the sound 10: sounds like a car in idle 12: damn why is that baby crying oh wait 13: me when i stump my toe in the table 15: I DID NOT EXPECT THAT

item.title: May we all be blessed with support like this
item.description: I love her. ❤️ I know this is an older vid and has already made the rounds, but I hadn't seen some of these clips before so I thought I'd share. I wish this kind of love for each and every one of you. ❤️ (Sauce: https://www.instagram.com/otakoyakisoba)

item.title: It Happened!
item.description: Still have both my kidneys. Frank is a nerd. All is okay
item.dc:creator: FrankTheKitten

item.title: Pit stop 1
item.description:
Stopped for a bit of gas and water. Frank was decidedly unhappy with the sun and the big big sky and wanted to crawl under the car. No, Frank.
He's settling down, even doing some grooming, so I think we'll be okay. Next stop, Bucc-ees in Sevierville, TN.
item.dc:creator: FrankTheKitten

item.title: It’s my cake day. Have some of my favorite things I’ve collected from Imgur
item.description:
Edit: My favorite is Picante Chicken
I also make stickers that my flea market said aren’t “family friendly” and write books about dumpster fire lesbians. If you’d like to consider perusing: https://ko-fi.com/anotherindiewriter/shop
item.dc:creator: unimaginativeperson

item.title: Do more than pray...
item.description: Well, Mr. Letterman, poo-boy has played the system so well that he has a tighter stranglehold on the Senate and House Republikkklan lawmakers. Never mind the $150 billion ICE force, his own personal (Jackboot Royal Nazi Guard), backing his play. The playbook of every megalomaniacal maniac for the last several millennia. All hail: Caesar Poo-boy Americanus https://rbreich.com/ Top menu then videos
item.dc:creator: Shawnofavitch

item.title: Such a brilliant move when America is already reeling from a crashing tourism industry.
item.description: Trump is another name of crodile's tears.
item.dc:creator: UndestructableDoctor

item.title: What is that?
item.description: That's the incredible female blanket octopus, and her main survival tool is one of the most ingenious and hardcore things in the entire ocean. She is immune to the deadly sting of the Portuguese Man o' War. Not only that, she will actively rip the stinging tentacles off the Man o' War and wield them like venomous whips to defend herself from predators. A brilliant and terrifying feat of natural engineering.
item.dc:creator: LosPer

item.title: "This is mine"
item.description: Cats and deer often prefer solitude, but they can form surprising friendships, demonstrating the beauty of coexistence in nature :)

item.title: Open Wide!
item.description: Candy Cocoon Time! Once the child is fully enveloped, the candy spider will descend to inject the Cocoon with digestive enzymes, liquifying the child into a sugar slurry.

item.title: Conservative Christians are not Christians
item.description: Fp edit To the few of you in the comment section who are saying that the quote on quote Conservative Christian is still a Christian have absolutely lost the plot. First, you do not get to give yourself a title without putting in any of the effort. The Bible is very clear on this and many spots. There are multiple practices that are ignored, ideals completely erased. Remember conservative Christians say Jesus Christ is too woke. And that right there is all you need to know about these people and anybody twisting themselves into pretzels trying to defend this. Do better. Use this as a guide to combat the anti-lgbtqia hate. Especially from want to be Christians who Cherry Picked the Bible Hey folks sorry I've been gone. My mental health tanked, my physical health followed. And on top of that, I just drove a U-Haul from Virginia to Minnesota
item.dc:creator: JustGridSquares

item.title: The American Civil War was primarily about slavery. The declaration of secession explicitly makes it clear.

item.title: meme
item.dc:creator: PixelSprite64

item.title: Afternoon memes
item.description: Hey, did you know my sole reason for meme posting is to get you to listen to my band? Help a shameless musician out by listening to the songs on mute 2-3000 times while doing the laundry. https://open.spotify.com/artist/19ptBf1ldxSQLo60aDiso7?si=P1bBQOm7SDGGyztTkuqEuw Best regards - me
item.dc:creator: Taltaron

item.title: TinyOctopus is a big hit so far!
item.description: @TinyOctopus has driven 11 hours to come adopt Frank, and he’s finally here in the kitten room! Not only does Frank seem to like him, but mama and Bambi do, too! He brought some toy mice that they all love. Jasmne is on her way with her adopted mother and I can’t wait til we can all get together!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: To better understand what a Russian kamikaze drone actually is. Ukrainians have to live through a barrage of hundreds of them every night.
